meaning: adj.宽的,阔的,广泛的,明朗的,露骨的,显著的,主要的adv.宽阔地n.宽阔部分
examples: He is tall, broad and muscular.
A broad range of issues was discussed.
He was tall and broad with humped shoulders.
The broad message is the same, even if it is a slightly larger contraction than expected.
And Stuart Broad marked his call-up to the Test squad with a five-wicket haul.
